Public demo 020 · Chronicle memory · capability reuse

Verified work
becomes
institutional memory.

Run a browser-local GoalOS cycle where only proof-cleared work enters Chronicle. Accepted evidence becomes a reusable capability package; rejected work becomes a warning, not authority.

Run the lab Inspect Selection Gate

No user data wanted. Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, wallet, seed phrase, private-key, customer, or proprietary information. This page is local-only: no account, no analytics, no cookies, no storage, no wallet, no network request, no external action.

Mission contract

Choose one repeatable workflow.

GoalOS remembers accepted proof, not persuasive output. Failed runs become visible lessons without becoming future authority.

Run state

Awaiting first mission

HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
Verified value—
Reuse lift—
Risk—
Latency—

Report-only output

A report can sound complete while leaving proof debt, unknown provenance, unresolved risk, and no reusable capability.

GoalOS Chronicle path

A GoalOS run emits bounded claims, proof packet, evaluator result, risk ledger, selection decision, Chronicle entry, and capability package.

Chronicle trace

Only proof-cleared runs become memory.

    Capability archive

    Accepted work becomes reusable.

    Protocol objects

    Inspect the package.

    
      
    
    
    
  
    

  
    
    
    
      
    Core idea
    
      
    No Chronicle entry, no institutional memory.
    
      
    GoalOS turns autonomous activity into a governed state transition. An objective becomes a commitment; a run emits proof; a gate accepts or rejects; accepted evidence enters Chronicle; only then can a capability influence a harder future mission.
    
      
    
        Objective→ProofPacket→SelectionCertificate→ChronicleEntry→CapabilityPackage
      
    
      
    Public demonstration only. This page performs no factual certification, no external audit, no token route, no wallet connection, no Mainnet transaction, and no production authority activation.
